title: Bia's First Wave
description: Past Simple for events that happened. Bia tells the class about the wave that changed her life — irregular verbs and all.
summary_pt_br: Past Simple contando a história da Bia pegando a primeira onda. Verbos regulares (-ed) e os irregulares essenciais: go/went, come/came, have/had, see/saw, take/took.

scenes.subtitle_en: A story told in the Past Simple

scenes.text_en:
I WAS eight. The sun WAS hot. I WENT to the beach with my dad.
I SAW a wave — big and blue. I TOOK a board he HAD.
I PADDLED out. I FELL once. I CRIED, just a bit.
Then I STOOD on the board, and I RODE. And I LOVED every bit.
scenes.text_pt:
Eu tinha oito. O sol FOI forte. FUI pra praia com o pai (went).
VI uma onda — grande e azul (saw). PEGUEI a prancha dele (took).
REMEI (paddled). CAÍ uma vez (fell). CHOREI um pouquinho (cried).
Aí EM PÉ fiquei, e SURFEI (rode). E ADOREI cada momentinho.

scenes.title: Past Simple — two halves
scenes.body_en: Regular verbs: add -ed. PLAY → PLAYED, WALK → WALKED, LIVE → LIVED. Irregular verbs: memorize them. GO → WENT, HAVE → HAD, SEE → SAW, TAKE → TOOK, COME → CAME. No -s, no -ed — the whole word changes.
scenes.body_pt: Past Simple tem dois lados. Verbos regulares: adiciona -ed (played, walked, lived). Verbos irregulares: decora — go→went, have→had, see→saw, take→took, come→came. Mudam inteiros.

exercise.question: Complete: 'She ___ her keys on the table.' (see)
Complete: 'We ___ a long walk last Sunday.' (take)
exercise.explanation: TAKE → TOOK. 'Take a walk' is a fixed expression.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Take → took. 'Take a walk' = dar uma caminhada (bloco fixo).

scenes.title: Past Simple questions and negatives use DID
scenes.body_en: For questions and negatives, use DID (or DIDN'T) + base verb. 'Did you go?' — NOT 'did you went'. 'I didn't see' — NOT 'I didn't saw'. DID carries the past tense; the main verb relaxes.
scenes.body_pt: Perguntas e negativas usam DID/DIDN'T + verbo BASE. 'Did you go?' não 'did you went'. 'I didn't see' não 'didn't saw'. O DID carrega o passado; o verbo principal relaxa.

examples.en: No, I didn't go to the beach.

exercise.question: Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: DID + base verb. 'Did you GO?' — never 'did you went'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Did + verbo base. 'Did you go?' — nunca 'did you went'.

turns.en: I was eight. My dad gave me the board.
turns.pt: Eu tinha oito. Meu pai me deu a prancha.

turns.en: I fell once — then I stood up. I didn't give up.
turns.pt: Caí uma vez — aí fiquei em pé. Não desisti.

exercise.explanation: Five irregular verbs — memorize them as pairs. They appear in nearly every past story.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco irregulares que aparecem em quase toda história no passado.

scenes.title: Catching the first wave
scenes.pt_summary: Primeira aula de surf com a Bia.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! Ready to catch your first wave?
turns.pt: Oi! Pronto pra pegar a primeira onda?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, but I am a little scared.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Do not worry. Watch me first.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lie on the board and paddle with your arms.
turns.pt: Deita na prancha e rema com os braços.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good. When the wave comes, stand up fast.
turns.pt: Bom. Quando a onda vier, levanta rápido.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am standing. I am surfing!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Awesome! You caught your first wave!

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am so happy. Thank you, Bia.

scenes.title: Listening story — Bia's First Wave
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Bia and a student. Past Simple for events that happened. Bia tells the class about the wave that changed her life — irregular verbs and all. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Hi! Ready to catch your first wave?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, but I am a little scared.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Do not worry. Watch me first.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Lie on the board and paddle with your arms.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Bia. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Bia's First Wave". Past Simple for events that happened. Bia tells the class about the wave that changed her life — irregular verbs and all. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Bia's First Wave". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Bia's First Wave'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Bia's First Wave".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: VOA Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Notícias em inglês lento — ótimo para ouvido iniciante.
